title: Panchari Bazar heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Panchari Bazar with a Z-Score of +4.26. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Panchari Bazar is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and the wind speed is 16.1 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The situation is critical, and the population is advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and follow weather updates for any changes.
